vocab.meaning: đường chân trời lộn xộn/dày đặc (do nhiều tòa nhà)
vocab.example: The once clear view of the hills has been replaced by a cluttered skyline of luxury condominiums.

vocab.meaning: khu phức hợp đa năng (nhà ở, văn phòng, thương mại)
vocab.example: Several mixed-use developments have recently cropped up near my home, providing both residential units and retail spaces.

vocab.meaning: công trình khổng lồ/nguyên khối (thường chỉ sự đồ sộ, đơn điệu)
vocab.example: There is a monolithic structure currently under construction that is set to become the tallest office building in the district.

vocab.meaning: vật làm xấu đi cảnh quan chung
vocab.example: Many residents consider the new brutalist high-rise to be a blot on the landscape of our traditional neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: giá thuê nhà cao ngất ngưởng
vocab.example: The proliferation of skyscrapers in my area has unfortunately led to sky-high rents for the surrounding apartments.

vocab.meaning: đổ bóng dài (nghĩa đen) / gây ảnh hưởng lớn (nghĩa bóng)
vocab.example: The 60-story tower next to my flat casts a long shadow over my garden, depriving my plants of direct sunlight.

vocab.meaning: trung tâm/khu vực tập trung đông dân cư
vocab.example: My suburb is rapidly transforming into a residential hub, characterized by numerous high-rise apartment blocks.

vocab.meaning: mặt tiền bằng kính lung linh
vocab.example: I am particularly fond of the new tech center nearby, which features a shimmering glass facade that reflects the sunset.
The sheer number of tall buildings creates a somewhat stifling atmosphere, as they block the natural airflow through the streets.

vocab.meaning: vật chướng mắt (thường chỉ các công trình xấu xí)
vocab.example: To be honest, the half-finished skyscraper at the end of the road is a bit of an eyesore for the local community.
